voice-cloning.note: Above this request rate, keeping a warm container (min_containers=1) is cheaper; below it, scale-to-zero (cold) is cheaper. rent model = 60/cold_start; plan model = 60/(cold+processing).

snapshot_verdict.failure_reason: /release_memory_occupation endpoint returns 404 Not Found. SGLang-Omni's multi-stage pipeline (separate AR/codec/vocoder processes coordinated via IPC sockets) does not expose the snapshot memory release/resume endpoints that standard single-process SGLang servers provide.
snapshot_verdict.methodology: Deployed with enable_memory_snapshot=True and experimental_options={enable_gpu_snapshot: True} on L4. Server started, health check passed, warmup request succeeded. POST /release_memory_occupation during snapshot-phase startup returned 404. Baseline cold start = L4 zero-shot cold start from U5 (290.3s).
